elements.title: Pellenes nigrociliatus
elements.contents: ... that the jumping spider Pellenes nigrociliatus (pictured) makes a silk curtain across the entrance of the snail shell that it uses as a nest?

elements.title: an Indonesian film
elements.contents: ... that advertising material for an Indonesian film included an entire chapter of the Quran?

elements.title: J. Verne Smith
elements.contents: ... that J. Verne Smith sold tires before becoming a state senator?

elements.title: Downtown Line
elements.contents: ... that the construction of the Downtown Line required diverting the Singapore River?

elements.title: Edward W. Hawthorne
elements.contents: ... that Edward W. Hawthorne once called his research "a personal vendetta against ignorance"?

elements.title: Cristero Museum
elements.contents: ... that the Cristero Museum faced demolition even though it is located within a UNESCO site?

elements.title: Moa Backe Åstot
elements.contents: ... that young-adult novelist Moa Backe Åstot also owns reindeer?

elements.title: siege of Castelnaudary
elements.contents: ... that during the siege of Castelnaudary the defenders were caught off guard while eating – and won?

elements.title: Neil Robertson
elements.contents: ... that Neil Robertson once missed a tournament after setting his sat-nav to Barnsley instead of Barnsley?
